response: This code implements an efficient O(n) sliding window maximum algorithm using a monotonic decreasing deque. For each element in the input `nums` array, it first removes indices that fall outside the current k-length window from the front of the deque, then prunes smaller elements from the deque’s end to maintain a strictly decreasing value order, appends the current index, and once the window is fully sized (when the loop index is at least k-1), the front of the deque holds the index of the current window’s maximum value, which is added to the result list.
